CYBERDOKU

SHARKCODERS classroom edition

Solve twelve cybersecurity investigations through logical deduction, practical challenges and careful analysis of the evidence.

Welcome to CYBERDOKU!

I’m SHARKY, your cyber investigation guide. I will offer gentle hints, celebrate each clue you unlock and help you reflect on safer digital behaviour.
